package rulefixtures

// scenario for sync_once_do_inside_loop: `sync.Once.Do(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule677PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario677Positive(records []Rule677PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
